title: 7.3 Major Issues in Contemporary Africa
description: 30 questions covering major contemporary issues in Africa including conflicts, poverty, governance, and disease

questions.question: What term describes Africa's continued strong ties with former colonial masters?

The Biafra War in Nigeria was between which ethnic groups?
What was the main cause of the Biafra War?
options: Unequal wealth distribution after Nigeria's independence
questions.correctAnswer: Unequal wealth distribution after Nigeria's independence

questions.question: What triggered the Nigerian civil war (Biafra War)?

Name ONE cause of poverty in Africa according to the textbook:
options: Rapid population growth, war, climate change, diseases, inadequate agricultural infrastructure
questions.correctAnswer: Rapid population growth, war, climate change, diseases, inadequate agricultural infrastructure
